title: carpobrotus subalatus
intro: Carpobrotus subalatus, also known as the purple-flowered or purple-flowered ice plant, is a succulent plant species native to Australia and parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Carpobrotus subalatus include its potential to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
